name: An Eldritch Memory
author: Qaday
bootlegger: The Cerenovous does not pick a good character. The Storyteller will choose what character the selected player is mad as.
Minions do not know that a Damsel is in play.
Each night, the General chooses a player. This doesn't do anything but open the possibility that they are a village idiot.
The Alchemist with the Marionette ability will choose a player each night*. The Marionette, if in play and chosen, will become the good townsfolk they think they are and recieve correct information.
The Oracle will wake on the first night and learn a 0.

If a player were to wake up at night and choose a player they cannot (i.e. the Snake Charmer choosing a dead player), they will not be told they are not allowed to select the player, and will instead be drunk that night.
The Leviathan only wins from executions if 2 good players are killed from consecutive executions.
